setup_description: Three colored blocks stacked vertically: blue (bottom), red (middle), green (top). The red block is the middle support.
causal_chain: The red block is removed from the middle of the stack
The green block (top) loses its support and falls downward
The green block lands on the surface where the red block was
The blue block (bottom) remains stable and undisturbed
correct_outcome: Green block falls; blue block stays stable; red block is gone
physics_principle: Removal of middle support causes upper block to fall due to gravity; bottom block remains stable if center of mass is supported
